Interface JsonSchemaObject.Type

All Known Implementing Classes:
JsonSchemaObject.Type.BsonType, JsonSchemaObject.Type.JsonType
Enclosing interface:
JsonSchemaObject
public static interface JsonSchemaObject.Type
Type represents either a JSON schema type or a MongoDB specific bsonType.
Since:
2.1
Author:
Christoph Strobl

  • Method Details

    • objectIdType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type objectIdType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing bsonType : 'objectId' .

    • regexType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type regexType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing bsonType : 'regex' .

    • doubleType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type doubleType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing bsonType : 'double' .

    • binaryType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type binaryType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing bsonType : 'binData' .

    • dateType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type dateType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing bsonType : 'date' .

    • javascriptType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type javascriptType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing bsonType : 'javascript' .

    • intType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type intType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing bsonType : 'int' .

    • longType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type longType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing bsonType : 'long' .

    • bigDecimalType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type bigDecimalType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing bsonType : 'decimal128' .

    • timestampType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type timestampType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing bsonType : 'timestamp' .

    • objectType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type objectType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing type : 'object' .

    • arrayType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type arrayType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing type : 'array' .

    • numberType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type numberType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing type : 'number' .

    • booleanType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type booleanType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing type : 'boolean' .

    • stringType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type stringType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing type : 'string' .

    • nullType

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type nullType()
      Returns:
      a constant JsonSchemaObject.Type representing type : 'null' .

    • bsonTypeOf

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type bsonTypeOf(String name)
      Returns:
      new JsonSchemaObject.Type representing the given bsonType.

    • jsonTypeOf

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type jsonTypeOf(String name)
      Returns:
      new JsonSchemaObject.Type representing the given type.

    • of

      static JsonSchemaObject.Type of(String name)
      Create a JsonSchemaObject.Type with its default representation via the name.
      Parameters:
      name - must not be null.
      Returns:
      the matching type instance.
      Since:
      2.2

    • jsonTypes

      static Set<JsonSchemaObject.Type> jsonTypes()
      Returns:
      all known JSON types.

    • bsonTypes

      static Set<JsonSchemaObject.Type> bsonTypes()
      Returns:
      all known BSON types.

    • representation

      String representation()
      Get the JsonSchemaObject.Type representation. Either type or bsonType.
      Returns:
      never null.

    • value

      Object value()
      Get the JsonSchemaObject.Type value. Like string, number,...
      Returns:
      never null.

    • toBsonType

      default JsonSchemaObject.Type toBsonType()
      Get the bsonType representation of the given type.
      Returns:
      never null.
      Since:
      2.2
